name: Timeless Body

compilation_state.summary: Successfully generated from druid class feature data.

description: Starting at 18th level, the primal magic that you wield causes you to age more slowly. For every 10 years that pass, your body ages only 1 year.
lore: The druid's connection to the primal forces of the world becomes so profound that time itself loses its grip on their physical form, echoing the longevity of the ancient forests.
